locations.name: SEAL Underground
locations.description: Specialized for advanced chemical and electronics work, equipped with chemical hoods and soldering stations.

locations.name: SEAL Shared Commons
locations.description: Serves as a dynamic space for group meetings and breakouts, with the capability to accommodate larger gatherings in an adjacent atrium.

locations.name: SEAL Main Office
locations.description: Designed for small group meetings and administrative activities, facilitating collaboration and organizational tasks.

locations.name: SEAL Electronics
locations.description: Dedicated to electronics projects, featuring specialized equipment for the embedded team's innovative research and development.

locations.name: SEAL Offices
locations.description: Offers a quiet office environment for students to engage in scholarly work, research, and collaboration.

locations.name: SEAL Robotics Lab
locations.description: Equipped for student projects and soldering, supporting undergraduate and graduate research in robotics and related fields.

locations.name: SEAL Nano
locations.description: Designed for benchtop experiments and collaborative research, focusing on nanotechnology and joint ventures with the NRG.

locations.name: SEAL Avionics
locations.description: Features a wind tunnel and essential equipment for avionics research, pushing the boundaries of aerospace engineering.

locations.name: Sister Lab — NRG MEB
locations.description: Specializes in polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) destruction research, promoting environmental sustainability and interdisciplinary collaboration.
